title: Battle of Yavin 4 (Empire Reborn)
content:

Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] *4 [[Jedi Trainer]]s *5 [[Padawan/Legends|Jedi Apprentices]] *21 [[New Republic soldier/Legends|New Republic infantry troops]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Desann *Galak Fyyar *''Doomgiver'' and most of its complement *All AT-ST walkers *Multiple Reborn *Multiple Shadowtroopers *Multiple Swamptroopers *Multiple Stormtroopers |casual2=*Many New Republic troops *A few Jedi Masters *Several Jedi Knights *Several Padawans |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} The '''Battle of Yavin 4''', also known as the '''Attack on the Jedi Academy''', was the battle during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] that saw [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]] defeat [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Galak Fyyar]] and [[Desann]]'s assault force. ==Pre-battle== After [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] agent [[Jan Ors]] was presumed killed during a mission on [[Artus Prime]], [[Kyle Katarn]], seeking vengeance, went to the [[Valley of the Jedi]] in order to re-establish his connection with the Force. Unbeknownst to him, his ship was being followed by [[Desann]] and [[Tavion Axmis]]. After being led to the Valley, Desann and Tavion used its latent Force energy to empower several soldiers with Force energies. These unnaturally powerful beings came to be known as [[Reborn]] Jedi and [[shadowtrooper]]s. The Reborn combined their forces with those of Imperial warlord Admiral [[Galak Fyyar]], and in doing so, gained enough strength to invade [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. ==The Battle== {{Quote|Strike Force One to Doomgiver: Eastward assault on Academy grounds proceeding as planned.''"
"''Strike Force Two to Doomgiver: Establishing beachhead outside main entrance.''"
"''Strike Force Three to Doomgiver: Reborn troops advancing on northern perimeter.|Strike force commanders reporting to [[Galak Fyyar]]|audio=StrikeforcetoDoomgiver.flac|}} With such a force primed for the attack, Fyyar launched the ''Doomgiver'' from his base on [[Cairn Installation]]. However, Kyle Katarn had infiltrated the Cairn base and was soon on the ''Doomgiver'' itself. The ship launched, with Kyle Katarn in it, and headed for the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]]. On board, Katarn eventually managed to alert [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] of the ''Doomgiver'', and soon made his way to the detention levels of the ship. After rescuing a still living Jan Ors and learning of the attack on Yavin 4, Katarn set out to disable the shields. In the shield generator room, Katarn met and battled Galak Fyyar, who was operating a mechanical suit made from [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]]. The duel resulted in Fyyar's cortosis suit exploding. After killing Fyyar and disabling the ''Doomgiver''{{'s}} [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], Katarn and Ors were able to reach an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] and evacuate the doomed ship. With the shields down, Rogue Squadron was easily able to destroy the ''Doomgiver''. Despite the destruction of the ''Doomgiver'', several of the ship's [[All Terrain Rapid Deployment Pod]]s were able to launch before the attack even began, and the ground portion of the battle began in the swamps of Yavin. Joining the ground troops was Kyle Katarn, who made his way through the swamps and to the main temple of the Praxeum. [[File:KylevsDesann.jpg|thumb|left|Desann duels [[Kyle Katarn]].]] The ground force of [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]], [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and specially trained [[Wetland assault stormtrooper|swamptroopers]] along with a few shadowtroopers encountered heavy resistance in the form of New Republic infantry. In the temple, the Rebon forces managed to reactivate the temple's supply of [[Remote/Legends|training remotes]] to open fire on the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Upon reaching the Praxeum, Katarn found the [[Jedi Trainer]]s and trainees to be holding their own against the invading stormtroopers and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]. It was, however, clearly apparent that Desann himself was commanding the landing force and was in the Praxeum. Katarn followed traces of the [[Chistori]] Dark Jedi throughout the Praxeum, until eventually finding him in the tunnels beneath the ancient temple. The two confronted each other and engaged in a lightsaber duel. Kyle Katarn killed Desann in the duel. Meanwhile, during the duel, New Republic infantry and the Jedi managed to rout the remaining stormtroopers and Reborn. The battle clearly lost, the surviving Reborn forces surrendered. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Most of your Shadowtroopers are being mopped up by real Jedi, ones who have been trained to use the Force. The rest blew up with your ship.|Kyle Katarn to Desann|audio=shadowtroopersDefeated.flac|}} Fyyar and Desann's attack on the fledgling Jedi Praxeum was one of the first real military tests that the [[New Jedi Order]] had to face. Despite the victory, Desann's apprentice [[Tavion Axmis]] still survived as well did several Reborn. They would later [[Disciples of Ragnos|attempt to resurrect]] the [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] of [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Marka Ragnos]]. The events of the attack on the Jedi Praxeum also led Kyle Katarn to return to the [[New Jedi Order]]. ==Behind the scenes== The mission appears in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050616a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 6: Outcasts and Megalomaniacs Welcome}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of the Battle of Yavin 4 (Empire Reborn)}} {{Reflist}} {{GCW Reborn}} {{Interlang |de=Zweite Schlacht von Yavin 4 (12 NSY) |es=Batalla de Yavin 4 (Imperio Renacido) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yavin 4 (Empire Reborn), Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of the Empire Reborn campaign]] [[Category:Battles of Yavin 4]]
